Home.manifestoTitle: FoxStudio is the R&D lab of FoxCase.
Home.manifestoLine1: We build what we wish existed.
Home.manifestoLine2: We break what we don't understand.
Home.manifestoCoda: No commercial roadmap. No jargon. Prototypes that actually run, technical notes, use cases that survive production.
Home.studioLead: We're a small group of engineers and designers who picked R&D over the roadmap.
Home.studioSecondary: FoxStudio is what FoxCase explores when no client is asking — and what we propose when one does.
Home.doorIncubatorsBody: You run a program, a fund, an accelerator.
Home.doorCompaniesBody: You have a problem, we might have an angle.
Home.doorTalentsBody: You build things, you'd like to build with us.

Project.placeholderBody: The full case study (long-form narrative, media, technical breakdown) is stored in Payload and rendered here once the CMS is wired to a database.
Project.placeholderSubBody: For now, this is a structural placeholder showing the 3-act layout (Context / Approach / Results) defined in the J1 wireframes.
